feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Hari Ini! Konser Amal untuk Pekerja Seni, Tantri ‘Kotak’: Ini Momen untuk Saling Support!

link.title: Hari Ini! Konser Amal untuk Pekerja Seni, Tantri ‘Kotak’: Ini Momen untuk Saling Support!

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Asosiasi Pekerja Seni Pusat (ASKIP) menggelar acara sosial untuk para pekerja seni yang terkena dampak Covid 19.
Acara yang diberi nama Konser The Story Of Artist: Tribute to Artis ini sebagai bentuk kepedulian dan penghormatan ASKIP kepada para seniman Indonesia.
Acara ini digelar pada Sabtu, 18 Juli 2020 pada pukul 15.00 sampai 17.00 WIB.
Konser dapat disaksikan melalui live streaming di channel youtube Kompas TV.
Tantri dari Kotak Band mengatakan bahwa dirinya bersedia ikut berpartisipasi untuk konser ini karena dirinya bersama pekerja seni lain, sama-sama terdampak akibat pandemi Corona yang sedang terjadi.
"Aku ngerasa ini momen untuk kita saling support sih," ujar Tantri.
Tantri juga berharap semoga konser ini bisa merangkul sesama musisi dan wartawan agar bahu-membahu untuk mencari solusi untuk bisa tetap bernapas di industri hiburan.
Kini para artis maupun crew event dan publik figure lebih memilih menghibur lewat media daring atau online.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Asosiasi Pekerja Seni Pusat (ASKIP) menggelar acara sosial untuk para pekerja seni yang terkena dampak Covid 19. Acara yang diberi nama Konser The Story Of Artist: Tribute to Artis ini sebagai bentuk kepedulian dan penghormatan ASKIP kepada para seniman Indonesia. Acara ini digelar pada Sabtu, 18 Juli 2020 pada pukul 15.00 sampai 17.00 WIB. Konser dapat disaksikan melalui live streaming di channel youtube Kompas TV. Tantri dari Kotak Band mengatakan bahwa dirinya bersedia ikut berpartisipasi untuk konser ini karena dirinya bersama pekerja seni lain, sama-sama terdampak akibat pandemi Corona yang sedang terjadi. "Aku ngerasa ini momen untuk kita saling support sih," ujar Tantri. Tantri juga berharap semoga konser ini bisa merangkul sesama musisi dan wartawan agar bahu-membahu untuk mencari solusi untuk bisa tetap bernapas di industri hiburan. Kini para artis maupun crew event dan publik figure lebih memilih menghibur lewat media daring atau online.

entry.title: Benjamin Keough’s Girlfriend Screamed ‘Don’t Do It’ Before He Shot Himself

link.title: Benjamin Keough’s Girlfriend Screamed ‘Don’t Do It’ Before He Shot Himself

entry.content:
Benjamin Keough’s Girlfriend Screamed ‘Don’t Do It’ Before He Shot Himself..
Meanwhile, Benjamin’s ex-girlfriend Alexa Rohde paid tribute to the son of Lisa Marie Presley in an Instagram post, posting some pictures taken during the time when they were still together. Jul 14, 2020  AceShowbiz - Details about death of Lisa Marie Presley’s son Benjamin Keough, who was found dead from a self-inflicted gunshot wound at his home in Calabasas, California on Sunday, July 12, have found their way out online. According to a new report, his girlfriend Diana Pinto tried to stop him from taking his own life.   Daily Mail revealed that Diana was heard screaming, "Don’t do it," to the 27-year-old in the moments leading up to him shooting himself in the chest at the mansion, where people were partying at the home at 1 A.M. before screams were heard around 3.30 A.M.       Police reportedly arrived at the scene around 6 A.M. According a neighbor, "She was pretty hysterical" when being interviewed by the authorities. The neighbor added, "[She was] saying, ‘I can’t believe …
entry.summary: Benjamin Keough’s Girlfriend Screamed ‘Don’t Do It’ Before He Shot Himself.. Meanwhile, Benjamin’s ex-girlfriend Alexa Rohde paid tribute to the son of Lisa Marie Presley in an Instagram post, posting some pictures taken during the time when they were still together. Jul 14, 2020 AceShowbiz - Details about death of Lisa Marie Presley’s son Benjamin Keough, who was found dead from a self-inflicted gunshot wound at his home in Calabasas, California on Sunday, July 12, have found their way out online. According to a new report, his girlfriend Diana Pinto tried to stop him from taking his own life. Daily Mail revealed that Diana was heard screaming, "Don’t do it," to the 27-year-old in the moments leading up to him shooting himself in the chest at the mansion, where people were partying at the home at 1 A.M. before screams were heard around 3.30 A.M. Police reportedly arrived at the scene around 6 A.M. According a neighbor, "She was pretty hysterical" when being interviewed by the authorities. The neighbor added, "[She was] saying, ‘I can’t believe …

entry.title: Rajat Mukherjee Death: Bollywood में फिर शोक की लहर, Famous Director का हुआ निधन वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Rajat Mukherjee Death: Bollywood में फिर शोक की लहर, Famous Director का हुआ निधन वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Rajat Mukherjee Dies. Manoj Bajpayee, Anubhav Sinha and others Tweet Tributes. Filmmaker Rajat Mukherjee who was known for directing films like Pyaar Tune Kya Kiya and Road, died due to health complications in Jaipur on Sunday. After his death, members of film fraternity, including actor Manoj Bajpayee, director Anubhav Sinha and filmmaker Hansal Mehta paid tributes to him on Twitter.
बॉलीवुड की फिल्में बनाने वाले दिग्गज डायरेक्टर रजत मुखर्जी ने दुनिया को अलविदा कह दिया है. खबर है कि स्वास्थ्य से जुड़ी समस्याओं के कारण रविवार सुबह रजत मुखर्जी ने अपनी आखिरी सांस ली. इस खबर के आने के बाद बॉलीवुड में शोक की लहर दौड़ गई है. मनोज बाजपेयी संग डायरेक्टर अनुभव सिन्हा, हंसल मेहता और अन्य ने ट्वीट कर रजत के निधन पर शोक जताया है.
#RajatMukherjeeDeath #AnubhavSinha #ManojBajpayee
entry.summary: Rajat Mukherjee Dies. Manoj Bajpayee, Anubhav Sinha and others Tweet Tributes. Filmmaker Rajat Mukherjee who was known for directing films like Pyaar Tune Kya Kiya and Road, died due to health complications in Jaipur on Sunday. After his death, members of film fraternity, including actor Manoj Bajpayee, director Anubhav Sinha and filmmaker Hansal Mehta paid tributes to him on Twitter. बॉलीवुड की फिल्में बनाने वाले दिग्गज डायरेक्टर रजत मुखर्जी ने दुनिया को अलविदा कह दिया है. खबर है कि स्वास्थ्य से जुड़ी समस्याओं के कारण रविवार सुबह रजत मुखर्जी ने अपनी आखिरी सांस ली. इस खबर के आने के बाद बॉलीवुड में शोक की लहर दौड़ गई है. मनोज बाजपेयी संग डायरेक्टर अनुभव सिन्हा, हंसल मेहता और अन्य ने ट्वीट कर रजत के निधन पर शोक जताया है. #RajatMukherjeeDeath #AnubhavSinha #ManojBajpayee

entry.title: Vietnamese baker use syringes to create 3D hydrangeas flower in gelatine cake

link.title: Vietnamese baker use syringes to create 3D hydrangeas flower in gelatine cake

entry.content:
A Vietnamese professional baker from Hanoi uses an unusual method of syringing ingredients into jelly to create ornate 3D flower cakes.
Timelapse footage shows the spectacular 60-minute process of Khanh Linh’s baking creativity by squirting in beautiful cream hydrangeas into the jelly cake.
entry.summary: A Vietnamese professional baker from Hanoi uses an unusual method of syringing ingredients into jelly to create ornate 3D flower cakes. Timelapse footage shows the spectacular 60-minute process of Khanh Linh’s baking creativity by squirting in beautiful cream hydrangeas into the jelly cake.

entry.title: Viral Video : पटना AIIMS में बदइंतजामी , Videoने उठाए इलाज पर सवाल वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Viral Video : पटना AIIMS में बदइंतजामी , Videoने उठाए इलाज पर सवाल वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
A video of Patna AIIMS in Bihar is going viral. The video shows a woman alleging that her husband is not being treated here. She is making this allegation in this video showing the bed lying empty in the hospital
बिहार में पटना एम्स का एक वीडियो वायरल हो रहा है। इस वीडियो में एक महिला दिख रही जो आरोप लगा रही है कि उसके पति का यहां इलाज नहीं हो रहा है। वो इस वीडियो में अस्पताल में खाली पड़े बेड को दिखाते हुए ये आरोप लगा रही है।
#ViralVideo #PatnaAiims #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: A video of Patna AIIMS in Bihar is going viral. The video shows a woman alleging that her husband is not being treated here. She is making this allegation in this video showing the bed lying empty in the hospital बिहार में पटना एम्स का एक वीडियो वायरल हो रहा है। इस वीडियो में एक महिला दिख रही जो आरोप लगा रही है कि उसके पति का यहां इलाज नहीं हो रहा है। वो इस वीडियो में अस्पताल में खाली पड़े बेड को दिखाते हुए ये आरोप लगा रही है। #ViralVideo #PatnaAiims #oneindiahindi

entry.title: LIVE REPORT: Rilis Penangkapan Catherine Wilson Terkait Kasus Narkoba

link.title: LIVE REPORT: Rilis Penangkapan Catherine Wilson Terkait Kasus Narkoba

entry.content:
Polisi mengamankan Catherine Wilson pada Jumat (17/7) pukul 10.00 WIB terkait kasus penyalahgunaan narkoba.
Artis cantik itu diamankan di rumahnya yang berlokasi di kawasan Jagakarsa, Jakarta Selatan.
Artikel Selengkapnya:
Dalam penangkapan itu, polisi menemukan dua paket narkotika jenis sabu.
"Kami sedang bawa ke Polda Metro Jaya. Sore ini tiba untuk lakukan pemeriksaan. Kami geledah langsung rumahnya dan ditemukan dua paket kecil, yang kami duga sementara itu sabu," terang Kabid Humas Polda Metro Jaya Kombes Pol Yusri Yunus di Polda Metro, Jumat (17/7/2020). Selengkapnya dalam video ini.
#CatherineWilson #KasusNarkoba #KasusNarkobaArtis
Video Editor: Yulita Futty Hapsari
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Polisi mengamankan Catherine Wilson pada Jumat (17/7) pukul 10.00 WIB terkait kasus penyalahgunaan narkoba. Artis cantik itu diamankan di rumahnya yang berlokasi di kawasan Jagakarsa, Jakarta Selatan. Artikel Selengkapnya: Dalam penangkapan itu, polisi menemukan dua paket narkotika jenis sabu. "Kami sedang bawa ke Polda Metro Jaya. Sore ini tiba untuk lakukan pemeriksaan. Kami geledah langsung rumahnya dan ditemukan dua paket kecil, yang kami duga sementara itu sabu," terang Kabid Humas Polda Metro Jaya Kombes Pol Yusri Yunus di Polda Metro, Jumat (17/7/2020). Selengkapnya dalam video ini. #CatherineWilson #KasusNarkoba #KasusNarkobaArtis Video Editor: Yulita Futty Hapsari ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Lannion : Nokia annonce un plan social, 402 postes supprimés

link.title: Lannion : Nokia annonce un plan social, 402 postes supprimés

entry.content:
C’est un énorme coup dur pour le site de la ville de Lannion (Côtes-d’Armor). Nokia va supprimer près de 402 postes prochainement.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Kabin Batik Air Tak Terapkan Physical Distancing

link.title: Kabin Batik Air Tak Terapkan Physical Distancing

entry.content:
VIVA – Pesawat Batik Air rute Jakarta-Surabaya kedapatan tak menerapkan physical distancing di tengah pandemi Covid-19. 
Hal ini terungkap dari video yang direkam Anggota Dewan Perwakilan Daerah RI, Ahmad Nawardi. Nawardi merekam ini ketika hendak ke Surabaya dari Jakarta pada Rabu siang, 15 Juli 2020. 
Dalam video, terlihat kabin pesawat yang penuh dengan penumpang, terutama di bagian depan. Sementara di bagian belakang terlihat masih kosong.
 
Semua penumpang mengenakan masker, sebagian bahkan dilengkapi face shield. Saat diprotes, pramugari menjawab bahwa tempat duduk tetap diisi penuh, karena penumpang sudah diberi face shield.
entry.summary: VIVA – Pesawat Batik Air rute Jakarta-Surabaya kedapatan tak menerapkan physical distancing di tengah pandemi Covid-19. Hal ini terungkap dari video yang direkam Anggota Dewan Perwakilan Daerah RI, Ahmad Nawardi. Nawardi merekam ini ketika hendak ke Surabaya dari Jakarta pada Rabu siang, 15 Juli 2020. Dalam video, terlihat kabin pesawat yang penuh dengan penumpang, terutama di bagian depan. Sementara di bagian belakang terlihat masih kosong. Semua penumpang mengenakan masker, sebagian bahkan dilengkapi face shield. Saat diprotes, pramugari menjawab bahwa tempat duduk tetap diisi penuh, karena penumpang sudah diberi face shield.

entry.title: This Virginia City Ranks as the Fittest City in the U.S. For the 3rd Year In-a-Row

link.title: This Virginia City Ranks as the Fittest City in the U.S. For the 3rd Year In-a-Row

entry.content: A list of the fittest cities in the U.S. has been revealed and the top spot has won the last three years. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.
entry.summary: A list of the fittest cities in the U.S. has been revealed and the top spot has won the last three years. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.

entry.title: Mammootty Fans Arrange Plane From Australia To kerala Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: Mammootty Fans Arrange Plane From Australia To kerala Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
Mammootty Fans Arrange Plane From Australia To kerala
ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയയില്‍ കുടുങ്ങിക്കിടക്കുന്ന മലയാളികള്‍ക്ക് കേരളത്തിലേക്ക് പ്രത്യേക വിമാനം ഒരുക്കി മമ്മൂട്ടി ആരാധകര്‍. മലയാളികള്‍ ഏറെയുള്ള പെര്‍ത്തില്‍ നിന്നാണ് കൊച്ചിയിലേക്ക് ചാര്‍ട്ടേഡ് വിമാനം ഒരുക്കിയിരിക്കുന്നത്. മമ്മൂട്ടി ഫാന്‍സ് ആന്‍ഡ് വെല്‍ഫയര്‍ അസോസിയേഷന്‍ ഇന്റര്‍നാഷണല്‍ ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയ ഘടകമാണ് ഈ സേവനത്തിന് പിന്നില്‍.ലോകത്തിന്റെ വിവിധ ഭാഗങ്ങളില്‍ മലയാളി സന്നദ്ധ സംഘടനകള്‍ വിമാനം ചാര്‍ട് ചെയ്യുന്നുണ്ടങ്കിലും ഇതാദ്യമായാണ് ഒരു ഫാന്‍സ് അസോസിയേഷന്‍ ഇങ്ങനെ ഒരു പദ്ധതി നടപ്പിലാക്കുന്നത്.
entry.summary: Mammootty Fans Arrange Plane From Australia To kerala ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയയില്‍ കുടുങ്ങിക്കിടക്കുന്ന മലയാളികള്‍ക്ക് കേരളത്തിലേക്ക് പ്രത്യേക വിമാനം ഒരുക്കി മമ്മൂട്ടി ആരാധകര്‍. മലയാളികള്‍ ഏറെയുള്ള പെര്‍ത്തില്‍ നിന്നാണ് കൊച്ചിയിലേക്ക് ചാര്‍ട്ടേഡ് വിമാനം ഒരുക്കിയിരിക്കുന്നത്. മമ്മൂട്ടി ഫാന്‍സ് ആന്‍ഡ് വെല്‍ഫയര്‍ അസോസിയേഷന്‍ ഇന്റര്‍നാഷണല്‍ ഓസ്‌ട്രേലിയ ഘടകമാണ് ഈ സേവനത്തിന് പിന്നില്‍.ലോകത്തിന്റെ വിവിധ ഭാഗങ്ങളില്‍ മലയാളി സന്നദ്ധ സംഘടനകള്‍ വിമാനം ചാര്‍ട് ചെയ്യുന്നുണ്ടങ്കിലും ഇതാദ്യമായാണ് ഒരു ഫാന്‍സ് അസോസിയേഷന്‍ ഇങ്ങനെ ഒരു പദ്ധതി നടപ്പിലാക്കുന്നത്.

entry.title: Sabaat Episode 16 HUM TV Drama 19 July 2020

link.title: Sabaat Episode 16 HUM TV Drama 19 July 2020

entry.content:
Sabaat, Episode 16, Official HD Video - 19 July 2020
The story of Sabaat is a saga of life’s greatest reality that nothing lasts forever and the only thing that stands the test of time is family, love and relations built on truth, sincerity and mutual respect. The story of this serial revolves around the wealthy Farid family. Meeral Farid is a young, bold and vivacious girl but she is narcissist and egocentric and wants to keep everything about life and family under her control, especially her brother Hasan Farid. Being her ‘partner in crime’, Hasan’s life is hugely influenced by Meeral’s decisions but the story takes an interesting turn when he decides to break free of the chains and rules set by his sister to pursue his dreams. What follows is an epic tale of brother-sister rivalry and Meeral’s fight against time itself.
Starring:
Mawra Hocane, Osman Mukhtar, Ameer Gilani, Sarah Khan, Seemi Raheel, Syed Muhammad Ahmed, Jahanzeb, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Jaweria Kamran, Leyla Zuberi, Moazzam Ali Khan & Others
Directed By: Shehzad Kashmiri
Written By: Kashif Anwar
Produced By: Momina Duraid Production
#Sabaat #HUMTV #MawraHocane #Osman Mukhtar #Ameer Gilani #Drama #2020
entry.summary: Sabaat, Episode 16, Official HD Video - 19 July 2020 The story of Sabaat is a saga of life’s greatest reality that nothing lasts forever and the only thing that stands the test of time is family, love and relations built on truth, sincerity and mutual respect. The story of this serial revolves around the wealthy Farid family. Meeral Farid is a young, bold and vivacious girl but she is narcissist and egocentric and wants to keep everything about life and family under her control, especially her brother Hasan Farid. Being her ‘partner in crime’, Hasan’s life is hugely influenced by Meeral’s decisions but the story takes an interesting turn when he decides to break free of the chains and rules set by his sister to pursue his dreams. What follows is an epic tale of brother-sister rivalry and Meeral’s fight against time itself. Starring: Mawra Hocane, Osman Mukhtar, Ameer Gilani, Sarah Khan, Seemi Raheel, Syed Muhammad Ahmed, Jahanzeb, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Jaweria Kamran, Leyla Zuberi, Moazzam Ali Khan & Others Directed By: Shehzad Kashmiri Written By: Kashif Anwar Produced By: Momina Duraid Production #Sabaat #HUMTV #MawraHocane #Osman Mukhtar #Ameer Gilani #Drama #2020

entry.content:
Bruins Announcer Jack Edwards Joins Emerson Lotzia On ‘NESN After Hours’

Bruins Announcer Jack Edwards Joins Emerson Lotzia On ‘NESN After Hours’
Bruins Announcer Jack Edwards Joins Emerson Lotzia On 'NESN After Hours'
entry.summary: Bruins Announcer Jack Edwards Joins Emerson Lotzia On ‘NESN After Hours’Bruins Announcer Jack Edwards Joins Emerson Lotzia On ‘NESN After Hours’ Bruins Announcer Jack Edwards Joins Emerson Lotzia On ‘NESN After Hours’ Bruins Announcer Jack Edwards Joins Emerson Lotzia On 'NESN After Hours'

entry.title: Vaishno Devi Shrine Board के अधिकारी की संदिग्ध अवस्था में मौत वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Vaishno Devi Shrine Board के अधिकारी की संदिग्ध अवस्था में मौत वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The officer posted as deputy manager of Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine Board was found dead on Tuesday morning in suspicious condition in his quarters in the famous Adkunwari temple complex on Mata Vaishno Devi Marg. The officer has been identified as Sham Singh resident ward number one, Katra.
माता वैष्णो देवी श्राइन बोर्ड के डिप्टी मैनेजर पद पर तैनात अधिकारी मंगलवार को सुबह मां वैष्णो देवी मार्ग पर प्रसिद्ध आद्कुंवारी मंदिर परिसर में अपने क्वार्टर में संदिग्ध अवस्था में मृत पाया गया। अधिकारी की पहचान शाम सिंह निवासी वार्ड नंबर एक, कटड़ा के रूप में हुई है।
#VaishnoDevi #VaishnoDeviShrineBoard #DeputyManager
entry.summary: The officer posted as deputy manager of Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine Board was found dead on Tuesday morning in suspicious condition in his quarters in the famous Adkunwari temple complex on Mata Vaishno Devi Marg. The officer has been identified as Sham Singh resident ward number one, Katra. माता वैष्णो देवी श्राइन बोर्ड के डिप्टी मैनेजर पद पर तैनात अधिकारी मंगलवार को सुबह मां वैष्णो देवी मार्ग पर प्रसिद्ध आद्कुंवारी मंदिर परिसर में अपने क्वार्टर में संदिग्ध अवस्था में मृत पाया गया। अधिकारी की पहचान शाम सिंह निवासी वार्ड नंबर एक, कटड़ा के रूप में हुई है। #VaishnoDevi #VaishnoDeviShrineBoard #DeputyManager

entry.title: FFP IS FINISHED AFTER THIS… WNTT

link.title: FFP IS FINISHED AFTER THIS… WNTT

entry.content: After Manchester City, PSG and AC Milan successfully defeated UEFA in the courts, Joe looks at whether this is the end of FFP and if not, what it means for the future of Europe’s biggest football governing body.
entry.summary: After Manchester City, PSG and AC Milan successfully defeated UEFA in the courts, Joe looks at whether this is the end of FFP and if not, what it means for the future of Europe’s biggest football governing body.

entry.title: செல்போன், டிவி- உங்க குட்டீஸின் ஆல்டைம் ஃபேவரைட்டா?.. கவலையை விடுங்க.. டயட்டை பிடிங்க.. டாக்டர் தீபா

link.title: செல்போன், டிவி- உங்க குட்டீஸின் ஆல்டைம் ஃபேவரைட்டா?.. கவலையை விடுங்க.. டயட்டை பிடிங்க.. டாக்டர் தீபா

entry.title: 4 Teknik Dasar dalam Futsal, Ternyata Berbeda dengan Sepak Bola Lho!

link.title: 4 Teknik Dasar dalam Futsal, Ternyata Berbeda dengan Sepak Bola Lho!

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Futsal sudah menjadi olahraga yang sangat familiar, tetapi tahukah kamu perbedaannya dengan sepak bola?
Walaupun ada banyak persamaan teknik antara futsal dan sepak bola, terdapat pula perbedaan yang perlu diketahui seperti passing, control, dribbling, dan shooting.
Teknik dasar yang pertama adalah passing. Salah satu bagian penting dalam futsal adalah passing. Futsal berbeda dengan sepak bola, di mana futsal lebih mengutamakan passing dan meminimalisir menggocek bola.
Kalau tidak ada teman untuk latihan, kamu bisa menggunakan tembok sebagai media untuk berlatih passing ya!
Dalam futsal, control lebih banyak dilakukan menggunakan sol sepatu. Berbeda halnya dengan sepak bola yang lebih banyak mengontrol bola menggunakan kaki bagian dalam.
Tips untuk control bola dalam futsal adalah jangan panik, tetap tenang, pandangan fokus, dan jaga keseimbangan badan.
Futsal merupakan permainan bola dari kaki ke kaki, tetapi kita juga harus bisa melakukan dribbling atau menggiring bola.
Dribbling futsal dan sepak bola berbeda, lho! Kalau futsal menggunakan dribbling pendek, yaitu bola selalu dekat dengan kaki.
Lain halnya dengan sepak bola yang banyak menggunakan dribbling jauh. Selain terus berlatih dribbling, kamu juga harus sering berlari, seperti berlari zig-zag dan berlari mundur agar kaki tidak kaku dalam melakukan dribbling.
Dalam permainan, tentu kita ingin mencetak gol kan? Oleh karena itu, kita perlu memiliki shooting atau tembakan yang bagus agar bola terarah ke gawang dan menghasilkan gol.
Secara garis besar, shooting dalam futsal dan sepak bola itu sama. Namun, biasanya shooting power dalam sepak bola lebih keras. Buat kalian yang ingin memiliki shoot dengan akurasi yang bagus dan keras, maka perbanyak latihan dan jangan cepat berpuas diri!
Nah itu tadi tips dan teknik dasar dalam bermain futsal. Selalu jaga kesehatan dan rajin olahraga ya!
#TeknikBola #TeknikFutsal #SepakBola
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Futsal sudah menjadi olahraga yang sangat familiar, tetapi tahukah kamu perbedaannya dengan sepak bola? Walaupun ada banyak persamaan teknik antara futsal dan sepak bola, terdapat pula perbedaan yang perlu diketahui seperti passing, control, dribbling, dan shooting. Teknik dasar yang pertama adalah passing. Salah satu bagian penting dalam futsal adalah passing. Futsal berbeda dengan sepak bola, di mana futsal lebih mengutamakan passing dan meminimalisir menggocek bola. Kalau tidak ada teman untuk latihan, kamu bisa menggunakan tembok sebagai media untuk berlatih passing ya! Dalam futsal, control lebih banyak dilakukan menggunakan sol sepatu. Berbeda halnya dengan sepak bola yang lebih banyak mengontrol bola menggunakan kaki bagian dalam. Tips untuk control bola dalam futsal adalah jangan panik, tetap tenang, pandangan fokus, dan jaga keseimbangan badan. Futsal merupakan permainan bola dari kaki ke kaki, tetapi kita juga harus bisa melakukan dribbling atau menggiring bola. Dribbling futsal dan sepak bola berbeda, lho! Kalau futsal menggunakan dribbling pendek, yaitu bola selalu dekat dengan kaki. Lain halnya dengan sepak bola yang banyak menggunakan dribbling jauh. Selain terus berlatih dribbling, kamu juga harus sering berlari, seperti berlari zig-zag dan berlari mundur agar kaki tidak kaku dalam melakukan dribbling. Dalam permainan, tentu kita ingin mencetak gol kan? Oleh karena itu, kita perlu memiliki shooting atau tembakan yang bagus agar bola terarah ke gawang dan menghasilkan gol. Secara garis besar, shooting dalam futsal dan sepak bola itu sama. Namun, biasanya shooting power dalam sepak bola lebih keras. Buat kalian yang ingin memiliki shoot dengan akurasi yang bagus dan keras, maka perbanyak latihan dan jangan cepat berpuas diri! Nah itu tadi tips dan teknik dasar dalam bermain futsal. Selalu jaga kesehatan dan rajin olahraga ya! #TeknikBola #TeknikFutsal #SepakBola

entry.title: AMU student Hijab case: What BJP leader has to say?

link.title: AMU student Hijab case: What BJP leader has to say?

entry.content: An engineering student of Aligarh Muslim University (AMU) has got a threat on social media. The Hindu student wrote a post in which she has written about how Hindu girls are being forced to cover themselves in AMU hostels. After this, the scared student has sent a complaint to the AMU administration and police. BJP leader Shakuntala Bharti condemned the whole matter. Watch video.
entry.summary: An engineering student of Aligarh Muslim University (AMU) has got a threat on social media. The Hindu student wrote a post in which she has written about how Hindu girls are being forced to cover themselves in AMU hostels. After this, the scared student has sent a complaint to the AMU administration and police. BJP leader Shakuntala Bharti condemned the whole matter. Watch video.

entry.title: #Lockdown : దేశంలో పెరుగుతున్న Corona కేసులు.. ఒక్కరోజే 30వేలు, మళ్లీ Lockdown దిశగా రాష్ట్రాలు..!

link.title: #Lockdown : దేశంలో పెరుగుతున్న Corona కేసులు.. ఒక్కరోజే 30వేలు, మళ్లీ Lockdown దిశగా రాష్ట్రాలు..!

entry.content:
India records 30000 cases in a day Covid toll goes past 24k Several Indian states are back under a strict lockdown to limit the spread of coronavirus infections BJP Bihar state president Sanjay Jaiswal wife and mother test positive viral fever also reported in many areas.
#Lockdown
#COVID19
#Coronavirus
#Bengalurulockdown
#Biharlockdown
#PMModi
#CoronaCasesInIndia
కంటికి కనిపించని కరోనా వైరస్ ప్రపంచానికి కంటిమీద కునుకు లేకుండా చేస్తోంది. కొత్త కేసుల నమోదులో బ్రెజిల్ ను కూడా దాటేసి భారత్ రెండో స్థానంలో నిలిచింది. బుధవారం వెల్లడైన లెక్కల ప్రకారం.. గడిచిన 24 గంటల్లో మన దేశంలో కొత్తగా 30, 142 మందికి వైరస్ సోకినట్లు నిర్ధారణ అయింది.
entry.summary: India records 30000 cases in a day Covid toll goes past 24k Several Indian states are back under a strict lockdown to limit the spread of coronavirus infections BJP Bihar state president Sanjay Jaiswal wife and mother test positive viral fever also reported in many areas. #Lockdown #COVID19 #Coronavirus #Bengalurulockdown #Biharlockdown #PMModi #CoronaCasesInIndia కంటికి కనిపించని కరోనా వైరస్ ప్రపంచానికి కంటిమీద కునుకు లేకుండా చేస్తోంది. కొత్త కేసుల నమోదులో బ్రెజిల్ ను కూడా దాటేసి భారత్ రెండో స్థానంలో నిలిచింది. బుధవారం వెల్లడైన లెక్కల ప్రకారం.. గడిచిన 24 గంటల్లో మన దేశంలో కొత్తగా 30, 142 మందికి వైరస్ సోకినట్లు నిర్ధారణ అయింది.

entry.title: Man Utd - Pour Matic, Martial peut devenir un des meilleurs attaquants du monde

link.title: Man Utd - Pour Matic, Martial peut devenir un des meilleurs attaquants du monde

entry.content: Grand acteur du rêveil de Manchester United aux côtés de ses compères d’attaque Marcus Rashford et Mason Greenwood, Anthony Martial crève l’écran ces derniers temps en Angleterre. Selon Nemanja Matic, son coéquipier chez les Red Devils, le Français peut devenir "un des meilleurs attaquants du monde" s’il améliore certains points.
entry.summary: Grand acteur du rêveil de Manchester United aux côtés de ses compères d’attaque Marcus Rashford et Mason Greenwood, Anthony Martial crève l’écran ces derniers temps en Angleterre. Selon Nemanja Matic, son coéquipier chez les Red Devils, le Français peut devenir "un des meilleurs attaquants du monde" s’il améliore certains points.
